# 93%  lean ground beef 2 packets*Created: Monday, June 18, 2018 at 7:54:09?PM*<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>93%  lean ground beef 2 packets</li>
<li>Salmon 2 pounds. Ask for the thickest middle portions and to cut into two inch pieces. </li>
<li>Big container of arugula</li>
<li>Big container of spinach <br></li>
<li>Protein bars </li>
<li>Made chicken </li>
<li>Bananas </li>
<li>Apples </li>
<li>Berries </li>
<li>Lox </li>
<li>Paper towels </li>
<li><br></li>
</ul>
